reasoning: High p90 downlink latency on the A1 interface disrupts the propagation of management policies from the Non-RT RIC to the Near-RT RIC, which subsequently impacts the downstream control of O-CU and O-DU through the E2 and F1 interfaces.
actionable_steps: Inspect the transport network and network functions between the Non-RT RIC and Near-RT RIC; check for network congestion, packet queuing delays, or resource exhaustion on the A1 interface endpoints.
